name: Quickie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt, cream of tartar, and baking soda.
2. Mix well until evenly combined.
3. Cut in the vegetable shortening using your hands or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container. The mix will yield approximately 13 cups.
5. Store in an airtight container for up to 10-12 weeks.
6. For whole wheat version, use 4 1/4 cups all-purpose flour and 4 1/4 cups whole wheat flour instead of 8 1/2 cups all-purpose flour. Increase baking powder to 5 tablespoons.
